"'''Sandbound on Tatooine'''" was a short story written for [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 10|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 10]]. It was written by [[Peter M. Schweighofer]] and illustrated by [[Jeff Rebner]]. [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]], the infamous [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]], had crashed on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], and encountered a number of local wildlife while escaping from the [[Dune Sea/Legends|Dune Sea]].

==Plot summary==
Having escaped [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]], [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]] crashes her [[Starship/Legends|starship]], ''[[Pok's Demise]]'', into the [[Dune Sea/Legends|Dune Sea]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Avoiding a [[Sandstorm/Legends|sandstorm]], she rides into [[City/Legends|town]] atop a domesticated [[Ronto/Legends|ronto]].<ref name="SandboundSummary">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref>

==Media==
===Collected in===
*<!-- 1997-01-XX -->[[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 10|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 10]]

==Behind the Scenes==
An [[RPGA|''RPGA™ Network''-sanctioned tournament]], titled ''[[Star Wars: Sandbound on Tatooine]]'', authored by [[Peter M. Schweighofer]] was released prior to the ''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' story.
